app.name: Letterblack Inference Workspace
app.description: Local inference workspace for GGUF models and llama.cpp

runtime.running.guidance: Start the runtime from the Runtime page or Chat strip.

models.exists.description: At least one model is registered
models.exists.guidance: Add a model source folder and scan for GGUF files.

models.selected.description: A model is selected for inference
models.selected.guidance: Select a model from the Models page or the Chat dropdown.

modelSources.exists.description: At least one model source folder is configured
modelSources.exists.guidance: Add a model source folder on the Models or Settings page.

profile.selected.guidance: Create or select a launch profile.

machines.exists.description: At least one machine is registered
machines.exists.guidance: Add a host or worker machine on the Machines page.
